title: Assurance Pack Event Envelope (v0.1)
description: Common envelope fields carried by every event in a Pack. The per-type payload is constrained by the corresponding event-type schema under schemas/v0.1/core/event/.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event within the Pack. SHOULD be a URI (e.g. 'urn:uuid:...' or an HTTPS URL). MUST be unique among events in the same Pack.

eventType.description: One of the eight canonical event types defined in v0.1.

occurredAt.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 timestamp at which the event occurred.

causality.description: Causal relationship to other events in the same Pack. Distinct from the positional hash chain.

parents.description: eventIds of direct causal antecedents in the same Pack. MAY be empty for events with no antecedent (e.g. the first run_started of a run). MUST NOT contain forward references or cross-Pack references. The resulting graph MUST be acyclic.

contextEvents.description: eventIds of events that provide non-causal context for interpreting this event (e.g. a tool_call referencing the project.tool.registered event that defines its tool). Referenced events MAY also appear in causality.parents; the relationship is informational, not causal.

prevHash.description: Hash-chain backlink. For the first event in the Pack's events array, MUST be null. Otherwise, MUST be the base64url-encoded SHA-256 of the JCS canonicalisation of the immediately preceding event including its signature field. See docs/spec/v0.1/events.md for the chain construction.

payload.description: Event-type-specific content. The shape is constrained by the schema corresponding to eventType (schemas/v0.1/core/event/<eventType>.json). Validators performing structural conformance MUST validate this object against that per-type schema.
